yesterdayAnalysis: Solid triple-discipline day with 107 TSS across swim (1.7mi), bike (24.9mi, HR 117), and run (3.0mi, HR 154). The swim-bike-run sequence mimics race day demands well, though the bike HR of 117 was notably lower than the 138 seen on 5/15's brick—good conservative pacing. Run HR of 154 post-bike is appropriately controlled, reinforcing the Oceanside lesson of conservative bike effort enabling strong running.
todayRecommendation: Recovery day needed after yesterday's 107 TSS triple. Consider easy 30-40min Z1/Z2 swim for active recovery, or full rest day given you're at 79% of weekly TSS target with 2 days remaining—you have cushion to hit 380 TSS.
